source.name: Level 5: 1.3 Test Your Knowledge - when to use tools
source.instructions: **When should you use tools rather than actions?**

answers.answer: When you want the LLM to decide which function to call based on conversation context
When you have more than one flow

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT decide when to use tools vs actions
source.guidance: Use tools when you want the LLM to dynamically choose which function to call.
